ats_utilities.config_io.processor.factory_processor module¶

Module

factory_processor.py

Copyright

Info

Defines class ConfigProcessorFactory with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for creating an file processor instance based on the file extension. 1th level of configuration loader/storer implementation.

class ats_utilities.config_io.processor.factory_processor.ConfigProcessorFactory[source]¶

Bases: IConfigProcessorFactory

Defines class ConfigProcessorFactory with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for creating an file processor instance based on the file extension. 1th level of configuration loader/storer implementation.

It defines:

attributes:
_PROCESSOR_MAP - Mapping of file extensions to processor classes.
methods:
get_processor_class - Returns the processor class for a specific file extension.
create_from_extension - Creates a processor instance based on a raw extension string.
create_from_file_path - Creates a processor instance based on a file path.
_PROCESSOR_MAP: Mapping[str, type[IConfigProcessor]] = {'.cfg': <class 'ats_utilities.config_io.processor.cfg_processor.CFGProcessor'>, '.ini': <class 'ats_utilities.config_io.processor.ini_processor.INIProcessor'>, '.json': <class 'ats_utilities.config_io.processor.json_processor.JSONProcessor'>, '.xml': <class 'ats_utilities.config_io.processor.xml_processor.XMLProcessor'>, '.yaml': <class 'ats_utilities.config_io.processor.yaml_processor.YAMLProcessor'>, '.yml': <class 'ats_utilities.config_io.processor.yaml_processor.YAMLProcessor'>}¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
classmethod create_from_extension(extension: str | None = None, scheme: Mapping[str, str] | None = None, processor: IConfigProcessor | None = None) → IConfigProcessor[source]¶

Creates a processor instance based on a raw extension string. Uses get_processor_class utility. Uses make_component and validate_component utilities.

Parameters:

  • extension (<str | None>) – File extension (e.g., ‘.json’, ‘.cfg’, ‘.xml’, ‘.ini’, ‘.yml’, ‘.yaml’) | None.

  • scheme (<Mapping[str, str] | None>) – Scheme for the processor | None.

  • processor (<IConfigProcessor | None>) – Instance to be used as the processor | None.

Returns:

Processor instance.

Return type:

<IConfigProcessor>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Extension must be provided.
ATSTypeError: Extension must be a string.
ATSValueError: Extension is not supported.
ATSTypeError: Validation of processor instance failed.
classmethod create_from_file_path(file_path: str | None = None, scheme: Mapping[str, str] | None = None, processor: IConfigProcessor | None = None) → IConfigProcessor[source]¶

Creates a processor instance based on a file path. Uses create_from_extension method. Note: If processor provided, it is returned immediately. If processor is not provided, creation is done from the file path extension.

Parameters:

  • file_path (<str | None>) – Path to the configuration file | None.

  • scheme (<Mapping[str, str] | None>) – Scheme for the processor | None.

  • processor (<IConfigProcessor | None>) – Instance to be used as the processor | None.

Returns:

Processor instance.

Return type:

<IConfigProcessor>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: File path must be provided when processor is None.
ATSTypeError: File path must be a string.
ATSValueError: File does not exist.
ATSValueError: Extension must be provided.
ATSTypeError: Extension must be a string.
ATSValueError: Extension is not supported.
ATSTypeError: Validation of processor instance failed.
classmethod get_processor_class(extension: str) → type[IConfigProcessor][source]¶

Returns the processor class for a specific file extension.

Parameters:

extension (<str>) – File extension (e.g., ‘.json’, ‘.cfg’, ‘.xml’, ‘.ini’, ‘.yml’, ‘.yaml’).

Returns:

Processor class.

Return type:

<type[IConfigProcessor]>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Extension must be provided.
ATSTypeError: Extension must be a string.
ATSValueError: Extension is not supported.
